title: SystemPricingPlan
description: A pricing plan defined by a shared mobility system, describing costs and billing rules for vehicle use.

planId.description: Unique identifier for the pricing plan

isTaxable.description: Whether tax is applied to this pricing plan

perMinuteChargingRate.description: Charge per minute of vehicle use

perKmChargingRate.description: Charge per kilometre of vehicle use

perTripStartingFee.description: Flat fee charged at the start of each trip

tags.description: Tags or labels associated with the offer
